KOSTAS Clearance Lvl 3 · Session 04:12:08 Vessel Registration Crew Certification Voyage Manifest Compliance Audit Fee Schedule Home › Financial Services › Fee Schedule & Payment Fee Schedule & Payment Calculator Form FS-07 · Rev. 14 · Effective 01 January 2024 · Required fields marked * Notice All fees are quoted in IMR Units (IMU). Bank transfers require 2 business days clearance.
    Expedited processing surcharge of 35% applies to all priority filings. Submitting this form
    constitutes a binding declaration under Article 47 of the Registry Act. 01 Applicant Details Applicant Name * Company / Operator * Email Address * Telephone * Application Type * Vessel GT Bracket
